topPriority.title: No Standardized Context Loading Protocol
topPriority.impact: Agents may skip critical context or fail silently

topPriority.title: Context Window Explosion (Token Waste)
topPriority.impact: Commands consume 15-25k tokens before work begins

topPriority.title: Inconsistent HITL Checkpoints
topPriority.impact: Agents may skip human approval points

topPriority.title: No Error Recovery Protocols
topPriority.impact: Agents halt or hallucinate on errors

keyInsight: Commands are well-structured for human readers but not optimized for AI agent execution. They violate modern context engineering principles.

references.title: Anthropic - Effective Context Engineering for AI Agents
